svg.text:
Firstly we need to create a new variable called 'wall jump'. This can be set to 0 to indicate we are not currently wall jumping.
We need to make changes to our 'Walk' custom block. We know we hit a wall when slope=8, and we still move the player back out of the wall. But now we check to see whether the jump key is held down and if we are moving fast enough. Then if we are not already wall jumping then we jump the player off in the opposite direction and set the wall jump timer to 15. The player looses control until this is 0 again.
